{{Quote|How many people have been invited to this party?|[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]]|<ref name="Star Wars: TIE Fighter">[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]</ref>}}
'''''Sumpntodo''''' was a [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|MC40a light cruiser]] belonging to the [[Rneekii]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]].

==History==
When [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|Modified corvette]] [[Hashim group|''Hashim'' group]], and the [[Unidentified TIE Defender chief scientist|Chief scientist]] on the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] ''[[G'nabgib]]'' dropped out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|Hyperspace]] to find themselves in a [[Ambush on Hashim|trap]] sprung by the Rneekii pirates, they were disabled by [[Ion cannon/Legends|Ion cannon]] [[Space mine/Legends|mines]] the Rneekii had laid in an attempt to capture them. Although, successful in taking the scientist the rest of the strike force was driven off by [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].

The Rneekii would return again with the ''Sumpntodo'' which had a squadron of [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]]. By then another pirate group known as the [[Nami]] had already stolen one of the corvettes that carried a [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defender]] prototype, and Stele engaged the Z-95s destroying most, if not all of the fighters, then boarded [[Cargo ferry]] ''[[Mssan]]'' 3 to rendezvous with [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
